# Shared Agent Compatibility Surface

## Scope

`.agents/` is the provider-neutral compatibility and shared-skill projection. It is not a native hook or policy owner.

## Structure

- `agents/`: compatibility projections of Stage 00 roles.
- `skills/`: shared generated skills consumed by Codex, Gemini, and compatible tools.
- `rules/` and `workflows/`: minimal navigation to canonical governance.

## How to Work in This Area

Change Stage 00 contracts and sources first, then run the registered renderer. Preserve unknown user-owned files.
